# Lickfun.xyz

> Social-first token launchpad on Monad. Launch meme tokens, trade on a bonding curve, earn on-chain reputation, and watch strong projects graduate to a real DEX.

Lickfun.xyz runs on Monad. Tokens launch with a flat 1 MON fee, trade along a bonding curve, and graduate to a Uniswap-style DEX pool at 69,000 MON market cap. Reputation is earned through on-chain behavior — not hype.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://lickfun.xyz/): Browse trending and new tokens
- [Discover](https://lickfun.xyz/discover): Search and filter all tokens
- [Create Token](https://lickfun.xyz/create): Launch a new meme token on Monad
- [How It Works](https://lickfun.xyz/how-it-works): Bonding curve mechanics, graduation, reputation system
- [Prediction Markets](https://lickfun.xyz/markets): Bet on token outcomes

## Optional

- [Token Metadata API](https://lickfun.xyz/api/token-metadata): On-chain token metadata endpoint
